mapper.sql: id, name, description, image_url, target_amount, current_amount, beneficiary_count, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM project ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM project WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM project ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project (name, description, image_url, target_amount, current_amount, beneficiary_count, status, start_time, end_time, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{targetAmount}, #{currentAmount}, #{beneficiaryCount}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE project SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, target_amount = #{targetAmount}, current_amount = #{currentAmount}, beneficiary_count = #{beneficiaryCount}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime} WHERE id = #{id}
